comment: S0 grand-strategy module splice order. Numeric prefix = splice order = override precedence (later wins by redeclaration). The build (tools/build.mjs) concatenates these in THIS order and splices them before the unique engine-end anchor in build/base.html, then writes civil_war_generals.html. Edit this list to add/reorder modules; never infer order from `ls`. 'overrides' lists base function names intentionally redeclared (the collision gate expects each to appear exactly twice: base + override).
